'''ComNet Corporation''' was a communications company located on [[Ord Mynock/Legends|Ord Mynock]] inside the [[Ord Mynock Freeport]]. It took control of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] communication outpost and relay station and held a virtual monopoly on communications in that sector.<ref name="Game" />

Their dome was one of the largest buildings in the Ord Mynock Freeport. It was large and studded with transmission dishes, laser-link relays, and other antennae. Since it was such an important and expensive structure, it was heavily guarded by ComNet security forces.<ref name="Game" />

==Sources==
